mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_document_tag ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document_tag (document_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{tagId}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document_tag SET document_id = #{documentId}, tag_id = #{tagId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_document_tag WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kb_document_tag WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
